merge_dependabot.description: Review and merge open Dependabot PRs

create_release.description: Create GitHub Release with tag + changelog

add_tests.description: Add test suites for untested modules

notes: Run 3796-3797: refactor on Vidly (replaced 100-line if/else GenerateActionItems with declarative ActionRule[] catalog + generic evaluator — 8 rules as struct records, data-driven action item generation). code_cleanup on agenticchat (removed dead _countMatches and _avgSentenceLength, extracted _matchWordList shared helper consolidating duplicated regex-loop pattern in _checkHallucination/_checkHedgeOverload).
previousNotes: Run 3794-3795: open_issue on VoronoiMap (filed #186 — _apply_intervention remove bug: sequential list mutation causes wrong-point deletion when removal targets are close together or duplicated; affects treatment effect, synthetic control, and spillover analyses). contributing_md on sauravcode (expanded toolchain catalog from 47 to 89 modules across 10 categorized sections — added 42 undocumented modules including autonomous tools, interactive tools, specialized engines).
previousPreviousNotes: Run 3792-3793: bug_fix on BioBots (fixed dilutionFactor/transferVolume coupling bug in serialDilution — previously accepted both independently, producing concentrations that contradicted the physical protocol volumes; now derives one from the other; fixed pre-existing test with wrong expected concentrations; 17/17 tests pass). docs_site on GraphVisual (added 3 documentation pages for undocumented advanced analysis engines — GameTheoryEngine (Shapley/Nash/coalition/Banzhaf), TopologyHypothesisTester (Scale-Free/Small-World/Random/Core-Periphery/Hierarchical null-model testing), GraphSentinel (structural drift detection with 6 analysis engines); added sidebar nav links).
previousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 3790-3791: refactor on prompt (extracted BuildTaskLookup dictionary + AllDependenciesDone/AnyDependencyFailed helpers in PromptGoalPlanner — replaced O(T×D×T) FirstOrDefault dependency scans with O(1) dictionary lookups; 18/18 tests pass). create_release on ai (v3.10.0 — Value Lock Verifier, Capability Elicitation Detector, CWE-117 security fix, collusion_detector perf, shared linear regression helper).
_previousPreviousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 3786-3787: issue_templates on everything (added accessibility_issue.yml with WCAG categories/assistive tech/semantic labels fields and data_storage_issue.yml with severity/recoverability/data-size fields; added Flutter Accessibility Guide contact link to config.yml). doc_update on sauravbhattacharya001 (updated PROJECTS.md — all 14 repo release versions to current tags, e.g. agentlens v1.4.0→v1.61.0, everything v3.0.0→v7.34.0; added metacognition mBFT as new section; added getagentbox release v2.7.0; updated date to May 2026).
_previousPreviousPreviousPreviousNotes_o: Run 3644-3645: add_docstrings on gif-captcha (JSDoc for 10 undocumented prototype methods in shared-utils.js LruTracker + webhook-dispatcher.js pause/resume/_checkRateLimit; 121/121 tests pass). issue_templates on BioBots (added ci_failure.yml and dependency_issue.yml structured issue forms with dropdown stages, impact tracking, and log rendering).
_previousPreviousPreviousNotes_646: Run 3646-3647: perf_improvement on metacognition (precomputed per-agent approve-round sets in _detect_collusion and vote vectors+magnitudes in _detect_sybil — eliminated O(A²*R) redundant set/list comprehensions; 52/52 immune tests pass). create_release on gif-captcha (v1.23.0 — Defense Posture Optimizer with Pareto analysis + JSDoc docs for shared-utils/webhook-dispatcher).
_previousPreviousPreviousPreviousNotes_: Run 3476-3477: contributing_md on GraphVisual (comprehensive CONTRIBUTING.md rewrite with full 147-class module catalog across 10 functional areas). add_tests on gif-captcha (65 node:test tests for SessionRiskAggregator — construction, addSignal validation/alias normalization/clamping/trimming, evaluate weighted average/decay/correlations/timeline, evaluateAll batch+TTL pruning, session management, trends, stats, weights, prune, report, export/import, reset, session isolation).
_previousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 3784-3785: deploy_pages on sauravcode (added docs/autonomous-engineering.md documenting 3 undocumented tools — sauravclone/sauravfossil/sauravautopatch — with usage, engine references, CI integration; updated mkdocs.yml nav + changelog v7.9.0; mkdocs build passes). setup_copilot_agent on FeedReader (rewrote copilot-instructions.md from ~10 original files to full 163-file/12-area module map covering autonomous intelligence, article analysis, reading analytics, feed management, etc.; bumped checkout to v6).
_previousNotes_prev: Run 3420-3421: add_license on metacognition (added MIT LICENSE, pyproject.toml license field, README badge). docs_site on FeedReader (new autonomous-intelligence.html documenting 11 undocumented features: PredictiveAlerts, KnowledgeGraph, CuriosityEngine, DebateArena, NarrativeTracker, SignalBooster, SerendipityEngine, ImpactTracker, BurnoutDetector, Autopilot, InboxZero; updated sitemap + nav on all pages).
_previousNotes_old3: Run 3318-3319: refactor on agentlens (extracted _window_totals + _pool_used_tokens in quota.py — deduplicated window-filter logic across 5 methods). create_release on WinSentinel (v1.11.0 — Security Flight Recorder CLI).
_previousNotes_old2: Run 3338-3339: security_fix on agenticchat (routed SmartConversationDigest.allSessions() through SafeStorage + sanitizeStorageObject — was bypassing incognito mode and prototype-pollution guards via raw localStorage reads). branch_protection on BioBots (added required status checks for build/lint/test CI jobs with strict up-to-date requirement).
_previousNotes_old: Run 3236-3237: refactor on VoronoiMap (deduplicated 5 identical _load_points into shared vormap_utils.load_points — removed ~74 lines). create_release on BioBots (v1.37.0 — Print Quality Autopilot, Lab Personnel Training Tracker, Bioink Batch Genealogy Tracker, labDigitalTwin perf, 4 refactoring cleanups).
_previousNotes2: Run 3302-3303: doc_update on GraphVisual (created TESTING.md — comprehensive testing guide with conventions, coverage gap inventory of 40 untested classes, updated README testing section). add_tests on FeedReader (25 tests for ArticleEngagementPredictor — cold start, prediction scoring, factor verification, score clamping, FIFO trimming, model retraining, analytics, label classification, reset, export).
_prevNotesOld2: Run 3238-3239: auto_labeler on BioBots (added issue-triage.yml — content-based issue auto-labeling with category/area/priority detection and auto-label creation). refactor on sauravbhattacharya001 (extracted logSpacedRates() shared helper from duplicate curve generators + declarative factorDefs/evaluateRules in analyzePrintability — replaced 60+ lines of nested if/else).
_prevNotesOld: Run 3214-3215: perf_improvement on ai (precomputed feature-vector magnitudes + time-sorted early exit in anomaly_cluster.py O(n²) clustering — eliminates per-pair sqrt and enables inner-loop break on time gap). refactor on gif-captcha (O(1) country risk lookups in geo-risk-scorer via hash sets instead of indexOf; single-pass listAll in captcha-incident-manager replacing 5 chained .filter() calls).
_prev4: Run 3204-3205: perf_improvement on everything (threaded activeContacts list through generateReport in ContactTrackerService — eliminated 4 redundant filter passes, reducing O(5N) to O(N)). refactor on Vidly (extracted AnalyzeInternal in FraudDetectorService — batch-fetches all rentals once in GetSummary instead of 2N+1 repository queries).
_prev5a: Run 3200-3201: perf_improvement on sauravcode (pre-grouped tokens by line in sauravcomplex.py — reduced function body extraction from O(F×T) to O(T + F×body_lines)). security_fix on BioBots (fixed prototype-pollution in experimentRandomizer — generateBlindingCodes used user-supplied treatment names as {} keys; now Object.create(null) + isDangerousKey guard).
_prev5b: Run 3198-3199: bug_fix on gif-captcha (fixed #127 — bounded memory growth in solve-funnel-analyzer with maxSessions/maxRecords LRU eviction). code_cleanup on FeedReader (replaced 22 raw print() calls across 14 files with privacy-aware os_log via FeedReaderLogger — prevents CWE-532 data exposure).
_prev5: Run 3192-3193: perf_improvement on VoronoiMap (precomputed symmetric distance matrix shared across DBSCAN, silhouette, eps estimation — eliminated 3× redundant O(n²) distance recomputation; pre-grouped cluster indices in silhouette_scores; precomputed DBSCAN neighbour lists in single pass). refactor on prompt (replaced ~120 lines of lambda-per-attack boilerplate in PromptAdversary.GetAttackGenerators with declarative AttackTemplate record catalog + MaterialiseVariant dispatcher — pure data, no closures, O(1) strategy lookup).
_prev6: Run 3190-3191: security_fix on ai (fixed broken DLP scanner — missing Severity import made entire module non-functional, also fixed deprecated utcnow() in evidence_collector). perf_improvement on GraphVisual (O(1) edge lookup via HashSet + linear-time pruneTree in SteinerTreeAnalyzer — replaced O(E) containsEdgeInfo scans and O(V²·E) degree recount).
_oldNotes: Run 2946-2947: refactor on gif-captcha (deduplicated ~80 lines of inlined LruTracker, _clamp, _now from trust-score-engine.js â€” replaced with imports from shared-utils.js). perf_improvement on VoronoiMap (eliminated O(nÂ²) sqrt calls in PSO objective functions â€” squared-distance comparisons in _obj_max_spread, _obj_min_energy, _nearest_neighbor_dists).

previousNotes_: Run 3504-3505: perf_improvement on metacognition (pre-tokenized query in find_similar, time.time() hoisting in hot loops, inlined config_similarity, single-pass health_check; 37/37 tests pass). create_release on agentlens (v1.59.0 — Session Autopsy, Auto-Triage, README overhaul, dependency bumps).
